policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-17 - Audit for latest version of application framework'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-17 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Function App Linux Powershell version
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the usage of older or outdated Powershell versions. Periodically, newer versions are released for Powershell software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest Powershell version for App Service Function apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes and/or new functionalities. This policy only applies to Linux Function apps and requires the usage of a specific Powershell version.

drcp.name: AppServiceFunctionLinuxPowershellVersion
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for latest version of application framework

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Specify the supported Powershell versions for Linux Function App.
